theme: forging a sprawling city that audits identically to a compact one
title: Sprawl Doppelganger
strategies: trivial: echo the zoning template H itself (matches the audit perfectly, zero stretch)
greedy: replicate H many times and wire the copies into a tree via one leaf vertex per copy -- passes the audit but diameter only grows like log(vertex budget)

strong: build an exact covering lift of H's unique cycle (break the cycle edge, replicate the spanning tree, re-glue copies into one necklace) -- passes the audit exactly (up to a fixed, L-independent leakage) while diameter grows linearly in the vertex budget
invalid: declare a vertex count above the stated cap
